hero.titleLine2: built for the way you work.
hero.body: eUDST is the gateway to online and professional learning from the University of Doha for Science & Technology, making it easier to explore flexible courses, build new skills, and access opportunities.

audiences.title: Skills that move careers forward — built around how you actually learn.
audiences.cardBody: Explore online academic and professional learning from the University of Doha for Science & Technology. Discover flexible courses, build in-demand skills, and take the next step with learning designed around real goals.

courses.title: Online, applied & professional courses for every learner.

items.a: Anyone — you don't need to be a UDST student. External learners and professionals can register for online academic and professional courses, and microcredentials.

items.q: How do I access my course after enrolling?
items.a: Once you complete payment, your course is unlocked from your eUDST dashboard. Launch any time from the same place — no extra logins, no extra setup.

items.q: What types of learning are available?
items.a: eUDST offers fully online, blended, and applied / immersive courses, plus stackable microcredentials designed around real-world skills and outcomes.
A microcredential is a short, focused credential that proves a specific skill. They're designed to be stackable — combine several to build toward a larger qualification.

items.q: Are eUDST courses recognised by UDST?
items.a: Yes. All academic and professional courses offered through eUDST are developed and accredited by the University of Doha for Science and Technology.

items.q: Which colleges offer courses through eUDST?
items.a: Courses are available across all UDST colleges: CB, CCIT, CET, CGE, CHS and CPE.

cta.title: Start your applied learning journey today.
cta.body: Discover immersive online courses and microcredentials from UDST — built for skills that matter.

footer.tagline: eUDST is the University of Doha for Science & Technology eLearning Hub — applied, immersive online learning that builds skills and careers.
footer.rights: © {{year}} University of Doha for Science & Technology. All rights reserved.

catalogue.title: Explore applied, immersive online learning.
catalogue.body: Browse academic courses, professional learning and stackable microcredentials from the University of Doha for Science & Technology — designed for real-world outcomes.
